name: avanquest-pdf-mcp-editor
description: View PDF files inside Claude Desktop using the Avanquest PDF web viewer.
long_description: Provides a display_pdf tool that opens a local PDF file in an interactive viewer rendered inline in the Claude Desktop chat. Powered by @avanquest/pdf-web-viewer.

license_key.title: Avanquest PDF license key
license_key.description: Your @avanquest/pdf-web-viewer license key. Required to render PDFs.

allowed_dir_1.title: Default folder
allowed_dir_1.description: First folder the viewer may open PDFs from. Leave all folders empty to use defaults (Documents, Downloads, Desktop, PDF).

tools.name: display_pdf
tools.description: Open a PDF in the embedded Avanquest PDF viewer. Accepts either a local file path or a remote URL.

tools.name: close_document
tools.description: Close the currently open document in the PDF viewer.

tools.name: get_view_state
tools.description: Return current viewing state: 1-based current page number, total page count, document title, and file path.

tools.name: set_view_state
tools.description: Navigate to a specific page in the currently open PDF document.

tools.name: read_document_information
tools.description: Read metadata of the currently open PDF: page count, title, author, creator, producer, creation and modification dates, file size in bytes, and status flags (isSigned, isModified, isReadOnly).

tools.name: read_page_info
tools.description: Read width, height (in PDF points), and rotation for a specific page in the currently open document.

tools.name: save_pdf
tools.description: Save edited PDF bytes back to the file system

tools.name: save_as
tools.description: Save the currently open PDF as a new file (copy) without closing it.

tools.name: compress_pdf
tools.description: Compress a PDF file to reduce its size — runs entirely on the server, no viewer needed. Accepts path (required), quality (min/low/medium/high/max, default: medium), and optional outputPath. Returns original size, compressed size, and reduction percentage.

tools.name: merge_pdf
tools.description: Merge multiple PDF files into a single PDF. Accepts paths (array of absolute file paths, minimum 2), and optional outputPath.

tools.name: split_pdf
tools.description: Split a PDF into multiple files. Accepts path (required), plus either: ranges (array of page range strings like ["1-3","4-6"]) OR pagesPerFile (number). Optional outputDir. Returns list of created files.

tools.name: rotate_pages
tools.description: Rotate pages in the currently open PDF viewer. Use pages for specific 1-based page numbers (e.g. [1,3]), or omit to rotate all pages. Angle: 90, 180, or 270.

tools.name: insert_blank_page
tools.description: Insert a blank page into the currently open PDF. Use after_page: 0 for first position, after_page: N to insert after page N, or omit to append at the end.

tools.name: add_image_to_page
tools.description: Insert an image onto a specific page of the currently open PDF. Accepts image_svg (SVG markup — preferred for generated graphics), a remote URL, or a local file path. Position and size are optional percentages of the page dimensions.

tools.name: read_bookmarks
tools.description: List all bookmarks (table of contents) from the currently open PDF with title, page number and nesting path.

tools.name: add_bookmark
tools.description: Add a bookmark to the currently open PDF pointing to a specific page.

tools.name: delete_bookmark
tools.description: Delete a bookmark by its tree path (array of 0-based indices).

tools.name: delete_all_bookmarks
tools.description: Remove all bookmarks from the currently open PDF.

tools.name: extract_images
tools.description: Extract all embedded raster images from the currently open PDF and save them as a ZIP archive.

tools.name: export_comments
tools.description: Export all annotations and comments from the currently open PDF as an FDF file.

tools.name: resize_pages
tools.description: Change the page canvas size of one or more pages in the currently open PDF. Accepts a named preset (A4, A3, Letter, etc.) or custom width/height in PDF points.

tools.name: delete_pages
tools.description: Delete one or more pages from the currently open PDF by their 1-based page numbers.

tools.name: move_pages
tools.description: Move pages to a different position in the currently open PDF.

tools.name: duplicate_pages
tools.description: Duplicate pages and insert copies at a specified position in the currently open PDF.

tools.name: reverse_pages
tools.description: Reverse the page order of the currently open PDF, optionally for a subset of pages.

tools.name: undo
tools.description: Undo the last action in the currently open PDF document.

tools.name: redo
tools.description: Redo the last undone action in the currently open PDF document.

tools.name: add_annotation
tools.description: Add a shape annotation to the currently open PDF viewer without reloading. Supported shapes: oval, rectangle, rhombus, line, arrow. Position and size are percentages of page dimensions (0–100).

tools.name: update_annotation
tools.description: Modify properties of an existing annotation in place: stroke color, fill color, opacity, or text content (for FreeText annotations). Use read_annotations first to get the annotation index.

tools.name: delete_annotation
tools.description: Delete an annotation from the currently open PDF by page and annotation index. Use read_annotations to list annotations and their indices first.

tools.name: read_annotations
tools.description: List all annotations on a page (or the whole document). Returns index, type, position, color, and comment for each annotation.

tools.name: update_document_properties
tools.description: Change metadata properties (title, author, subject, keywords) of the currently open PDF.

tools.name: add_text_to_page
tools.description: Add a plain text label or annotation to a page in the currently open PDF. Use to add labels or headers above form fields.

tools.name: add_form_field
tools.description: Add a fillable form field (text box, checkbox, dropdown, etc.) to a page in the currently open PDF. Position and size are percentages of page dimensions.

tools.name: read_form_fields
tools.description: List all fillable form fields (AcroForm) in the currently open PDF with their names, types, current values, and options.

tools.name: update_form_field
tools.description: Set the value of a fillable form field in the currently open PDF by its field name.

tools.name: read_page_text_blocks
tools.description: List all text blocks on a page with index and full text — use before format_text to inspect text structure.

tools.name: format_text
tools.description: Apply font formatting (size, family, bold, italic, underline, strikeout, color, highlight) to a text fragment in the currently open PDF.

tools.name: apply_redactions
tools.description: Permanently burn all existing redaction annotations (already marked areas) into the page content of the currently open PDF. To redact by text content, use search_and_redact instead. This action cannot be undone.

tools.name: delete_bates_numbering
tools.description: Remove all Bates numbering from the currently open PDF.

tools.name: delete_watermark
tools.description: Remove watermarks from the specified page range of the currently open PDF.

tools.name: delete_header
tools.description: Remove headers and footers from the specified page range of the currently open PDF.

tools.name: delete_page_number
tools.description: Remove page numbers from the currently open PDF.

tools.name: delete_text_blocks
tools.description: Delete one or more editable text blocks from a page in the currently open PDF. Use read_page_text_blocks first to get 0-based block indices. Page is 1-based (same as all other tools).

tools.name: convert_to_images
tools.description: Convert all pages of the currently open PDF to PNG images and save them as a ZIP archive.

tools.name: extract_pages
tools.description: Extract specific pages from the currently open PDF and save them as a new PDF file.

tools.name: search_in_pdf
tools.description: Search for text in the currently open PDF. Highlights all matches in the viewer and returns the total match count and 1-based page numbers where matches were found.

tools.name: navigate_search_result
tools.description: Navigate to the next or previous search result in the currently open PDF viewer. Requires search_in_pdf to have been called first.

tools.name: read_text
tools.description: Extract all text content from the currently open PDF document as a plain string.

tools.name: replace_text
tools.description: Find and replace text in the content of the currently open PDF. Works on native PDF text content across the specified page or all pages.

tools.name: get_page_image
tools.description: Render a page of the currently open PDF as a PNG image so it can be visually inspected.

tools.name: search_and_redact
tools.description: Find all occurrences of the specified text in the currently open PDF, mark them as redaction annotations, and permanently apply the redactions.

tools.name: set_security_permissions
tools.description: Set password protection and access permissions on the currently open PDF. Supports user_password (open password), owner_password (permissions password), encryption (AES-256 default), and individual flags: allow_printing, allow_copying, allow_editing, allow_annotations, allow_forms.

tools.name: circle_text
tools.description: Find all occurrences of a word or phrase in the currently open PDF and draw a rectangle or oval around each one. If shape or color not specified, ask the user first.

tools.name: get_selection_info
tools.description: Read info about the currently selected text in the PDF viewer: the text content and its font attributes (family, size, style, colors).

tools.name: format_selected_text
tools.description: Apply font formatting (bold, italic, font family, size, color, highlight, underline, strikeout) to the currently selected text in the PDF viewer.

tools.name: reset_selection
tools.description: Clear the current text selection in the PDF viewer (remove the blue highlight from selected text).

tools.name: insert_page_number
tools.description: Add page numbers to the currently open PDF. Format: plain (%1%), dash (-%1%-), Page N, N of M, N/M, Page N of M. Position: top/bottom × left/center/right. Font: family, size (pt), color (hex). Range: specific pages or all. Start number: offset for multi-file documents.
